description: Specialising in great designs created by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This bag is a love-forever classic that you can wear with colour-pop brights, understated outfits or with colour blocked ensembles. Versatile, stylish, accommodating and a utility-essential, this bag works well as a classy carry-all.Height: 26 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 10 cmMade of textured two tone leatheretteTwo leather handles Two main compartments with fabric inner; a pouch inside the first compartment and a zippered pocket in the secondZippered pocket at the backBuckle and rivet detail at the sidesBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
